fields.label: Population Profile
fields.description: Age, sex, health status, indication for tadalafil/PDE5-inhibitor exposure, baseline disease risk, and directness to mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.

fields.label: Tadalafil Exposure
fields.description: Drug name, tadalafil versus other PDE5 inhibitor, dose, timing, frequency, duration, route, and whether exposure is acute, daily, intermittent, or unclear.

fields.label: PDE5 Agent
fields.description: Specific PDE5 inhibitor or inhibitor set studied or synthesized: tadalafil, sildenafil, vardenafil, avanafil, mixed PDE5 inhibitors, or unspecified PDE5 class.

fields.label: Agent Directness To Tadalafil
fields.description: Whether the record is direct tadalafil evidence, mixed tadalafil plus adjacent PDE5 evidence, adjacent non-tadalafil PDE5 evidence, class-level evidence, or unclear.

fields.label: Class Transfer Limits
fields.description: Pharmacokinetic, dose, exposure-pattern, PDE selectivity, indication, population, comparator, endpoint, or safety reasons that limit transfer from PDE5-class or non-tadalafil evidence to tadalafil claims.

fields.label: Indication Context
fields.description: Whether use is on-label, off-label, experimental, observational medication exposure, or mechanistic/nonclinical.

fields.label: Study Design
fields.description: Design, randomization/blinding status, comparator, sample size, follow-up duration, and whether the source is a study, review, label, pharmacovigilance report, or mechanism paper.

fields.label: Comparator Context
fields.description: Placebo, baseline, active comparator, non-use, within-person comparison, external comparator, or no comparator.

fields.label: Endpoint Domain
fields.description: Cognition, mood/well-being, cardiovascular, exercise/physical function, longevity/healthspan, safety, or mechanism.

fields.label: Endpoint Measure
fields.description: The specific measured outcome, instrument, biomarker, clinical endpoint, adverse event, or mechanistic endpoint.

fields.label: Effect Estimate
fields.description: Quantitative result when available, or a tightly bounded qualitative/null/mixed result; include uncertainty intervals and p values when reported.

fields.label: Safety Findings
fields.description: Adverse events, discontinuations, contraindications, interaction risks, dose limits, renal/hepatic caveats, and serious-signal boundaries relevant to the record.

fields.label: Directness To Target Population
fields.description: How directly the evidence applies to mostly healthy men age 30 to 50, and which age, sex, diagnosis, indication, dose, duration, or setting differences weaken transfer.

fields.label: Confounding And Bias Limits
fields.description: Design limitations, confounding by indication, selection bias, measurement limits, multiplicity, surrogate-endpoint limits, missing safety capture, or incomplete reporting.

fields.label: Source Locator
fields.description: The page, section, table, figure, appendix, registry field, label section, or URL location used to verify the extracted finding.
